author: bridge-bot
content:
<ladislaus0x> re: **@L1zkevm_bot**
> <kevaundray> **L1-zkEVM Breakout Call #03**

Starting: April 8th, 2026, 15:00 UTC

**Location:** https://ethereumfoundation.zoom.us/j/81023492247?pwd=xdDpTCna7IdyWOmYTQNmwI2svBTOBT.1

**Agenda**

- Update on evm-asm progress 
- Update on devnet
- Project updates
- Q&A

**Notable** 

- Guest programs under ZisK v0.16 have gotten 2x faster to prove
- 20x reduction in execution witness generation with new endpoint for worse cases
- Identified 29 spec compliant issues in 3 zkEVMs
- Integrated open telemetry to show proof metrics for zkboost (dashboard included)
- New spec release zkvm@v0.3.3
FYI: starting in ~1h
